headline: Cboe Global Markets Declares Second-Quarter 2026 Dividend
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity derivatives, today announced its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.72 per share of common stock for the second quarter of 2026. The second-quarter 2026 dividend is payable on June 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 29, 2026.

headline: Cboe Global Markets Announces 2026 Annual Meeting Results
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity derivatives, today announced the preliminary shareholder voting results from its 2026 Annual Meeting held today.

headline: DRAM ETF’s 85% Surge Masks a Dangerous Bet: Why This Memory Play Doesn’t Belong in Retirement Portfolios
summary: The Roundhill Memory ETF (CBOE:DRAM) launched on April 2, 2026 as the first U.S.-listed fund built entirely around memory chip makers, and it has already returned 85% since inception. For a retiree screening DRAM as an inflation hedge or AI-themed growth sleeve, that headline number is the wrong place to start. DRAM is a concentrated, ... headline: WisdomTree Launches Physical AI, Humanoids, and Drones Fund (WDRN)
summary: NEW YORK, May 14, 2026--WisdomTree launches the Physical AI, Humanoids, and Drones Fund (WDRN), provide exposure to companies enabling AI deployment in the physical world.
